title: Table union data error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 FLOAT, unique_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', 1.5), (0, 'example', NULL);
SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c1 = 1 UNION SELECT CAST(c3 AS INT) FROM t2 WHERE c3 IS NULL;
SELECT c2 FROM t2 WHERE c1 < 2 UNION SELECT CAST(c1 AS VARCHAR) FROM t2 WHERE c2 = 'test';
SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c1 = 0 UNION SELECT CAST(c3 AS INT) FROM t2 WHERE c3 > 1.0;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from UNION of different data types
